public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as public safety regional leader.
manner: Thinks in wear, strain, and bottlenecks, treating neglect as a slow-moving threat. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a public safety regional leader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of public safety regional leader in and around Ashforge Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Quarry workable through the obligations of public safety regional leader while managing the immediate pressure of predators in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Ashforge Quarry, that usually means carrying predators, avalanches, geothermal bursts without letting the role of public safety regional leader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Hildran Wyvernharn needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Ashforge Quarry.
Working with Hildran Wyvernharn can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Ashforge Quarry.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Hildran Wyvernharn visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Ashforge Quarry, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Hill Giant foremen, industrial clans.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Quarry: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
